data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the Welcome Series (Day 0) confirmation email.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of a confirmation email that includes specific elements such as booking details, provider bio, and preparation checklist. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of this email. The prior steps focus on booking and calendar management but do not address the email content directly, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of the confirmation email with required elements.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence and content of the confirmation email.
